mapper.sql:
b.deleted = 0
AND b.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.brandName}, '%')
AND b.english_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.brandEnglishName}, '%')
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.seriesName}, '%')
AND s.english_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.seriesEnglishName}, '%')
AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.makerName}, '%')
AND m.english_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.makerEnglishName}, '%')
AND COALESCE(m.status, s.status, b.status) = #{query.status}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_brand b LEFT JOIN t_series s ON s.brand_id = b.id AND s.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN t_maker m ON m.series_id = s.id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE

SELECT CASE WHEN m.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('maker:', m.id) WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('series:', s.id) ELSE CONCAT('brand:', b.id) END AS id, CASE WHEN m.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'maker' WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'series' ELSE 'brand' END AS nodeType, b.id AS brandId, b.name AS brandName, b.english_name AS brandEnglishName, s.id AS seriesId, s.name AS seriesName, s.english_name AS seriesEnglishName, m.id AS makerId, m.name AS makerName, m.english_name AS makerEnglishName, COALESCE(m.status, s.status, b.status) AS status, GREATEST( COALESCE(b.update_time, b.create_time), COALESCE(s.update_time, s.create_time, b.update_time, b.create_time), COALESCE(m.update_time, m.create_time, s.update_time, s.create_time, b.update_time, b.create_time) ) AS updateTime FROM t_brand b LEFT JOIN t_series s ON s.brand_id = b.id AND s.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN t_maker m ON m.series_id = s.id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE ORDER BY
b.create_time
updateTime
ASC
DESC
, b.id ASC, s.id ASC, m.id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
